news.t: Here are some ETFs State Street likes with recession worries, Fed rate hikes in focus

holdings.infoBox: FLQL is an equity ETF with a total of 215 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 7.32%, NVIDIA at 6.89%, Microsoft at 4.07%, Alphabet at 4.03%, and Alphabet at 3.26%.

overview.description: The Franklin U.S. Large Cap Multifactor Index ETF (FLQL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the LibertyQ US Large Cap Equity index. The fund tracks a multi-factor US large-cap index. Stocks are selected and weighted based on a combination of quality, value, momentum, and low-volatility factors. FLQL was launched on Apr 26, 2017 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.
infoTable: LibertyQ US Large Cap Equity Index

data.text: Hello! For this week's ETF Wrap, I spoke with Franklin Templeton's Wylie Tollette on the Federal Reserve's interest-rate decision and caught up with State Street's Michael Arone on his midyear ETF mar...
